name: sistema-portaria-joaoxxiii
description: Sistema de Portaria - Fundação Educacional João XXIII | Desenvolvido pela MADev

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
